sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202644499__ZEBRA_Permanent_Block_Discovery_Halt_via_Gossi
sigma_rules.description: Detects activity related to CVE-2026-44499 - ZEBRA: Permanent Block Discovery Halt via Gossip Queue Saturation and Syncer Poison

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202642793__Atom_table_exhaustion_via_attackercontrolled_G

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202642353__Path_traversal__SSRF_in_i18nexthttpmiddleware

rule CDB_RANSOMWARE_Unknown_Exco_Technologies {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for [RANSOMWARE] Unknown: Exco Technologies"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-08"
    strings:

}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-44499 - ZEBRA: Permanent Block Discovery Halt via G"; content:"CVE-2026-44499"; nocase; sid:4103314; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-42793 - Atom table exhaustion via attacker-controll"; content:"CVE-2026-42793"; nocase; sid:5407674; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-42353 - Path traversal / SSRF in i18next-http-middl"; content:"CVE-2026-42353"; nocase; sid:9427863; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
